question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

answer: The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.

assessment.note: Says the work shipped but was heavier than presented, which signals hidden strain and some mismatch between apparent and actual load.

new_queue.label: Heavier than sounded
new_queue.name: When you say it was 'heavier' — what was adding the weight?

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Post-launch load
new_queue.name: Now that those launches are done, what is still keeping your load high?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Decision bottlenecks
new_queue.name: Where are decisions still landing back on you that probably shouldn’t?

new_queue.label: What needs air cover
new_queue.name: What would you want more air cover on from me right now?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks steadier
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
